# Mixed Content

Paragraph before the list.

- Parent
  - Child with [link](https://example.com)
  - Child with `inline code`

1. Ordered parent
2. Ordered sibling

> Quote line one.
>
> Quote line two with **bold**.

Line with a hard break\
next line.

```tsx
export function Example() {
  return <span>hello</span>;
}
```
